title: jatropha anomala
intro: Jatropha anomala, also known as the bitter bitter apple or bitter apple, is a plant species in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae) that is native to India and other parts of Asia. The plant's leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Jatropha anomala include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a treatment for snake bites. The plant's medicinal properties can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
